name: Spinach Dip II
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the frozen spinach well and squeeze out all excess moisture.
2. Chop the spinach finely, either by hand or using a food processor.
3. Combine the chopped spinach with the sour cream, mayonnaise, Knorr Leek Soup mix, garlic powder, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
4. Blend the mixture until smooth.
5. Refrigerate the dip for at least 4 hours before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
